basedOn: smartcopilot.cfg v1.4 by docpan (Colimata Concorde FXP 1.10)
_comment: TRIGGERS+TRANSPONDER+RADIO -> onchange datarefs; custom fuel tank quantities (CON_SYS_FUEL_tank_*) from CONTINUED -> continuous (physics-master-only, Concorde CG depends on fuel transfer); COMMANDS -> commands with hold relay. Excluded: throttle/reverser/yoke/brakes/axes (UDP PhysicsSync), sim m_fuel (UDP fuel stream), sim time (WeatherSync).
